# OverseeX - AI Agent Testing & Monitoring Platform
# https://overseex.com

## About
OverseeX is the complete testing and monitoring platform for AI agents. We help developers debug, trace, and optimize LLM applications with real-time observability, multi-agent coordination intelligence, and automated regression detection.

## Key Features
- Real-time AI agent monitoring and tracing
- Multi-agent coordination intelligence
- LLM observability and debugging
- Automated regression detection
- Cost tracking and optimization
- PII redaction for compliance
- Health monitoring and alerting
- Webhook integrations

## Supported Frameworks
- LangChain & LangGraph
- CrewAI
- Microsoft AutoGen
- OpenAI API
- Anthropic Claude API
- Vercel AI SDK
- Custom REST API integrations

## SDKs
- Python SDK: pip install overseex
- TypeScript/JavaScript SDK: npm install @overseex/sdk
- REST API available for all languages

## Use Cases
- Monitor AI agent performance in production
- Debug multi-agent coordination issues
- Track LLM costs and token usage
- Detect and prevent AI regressions
- Ensure AI compliance with PII handling
- Real-time alerting for agent failures

## Pricing
- Free tier available with 1,000 traces/month
- Starter plan: $29/month - 10,000 traces
- Pro plan: $99/month - 100,000 traces
- Team plan: $299/month - Unlimited traces

## Contact
- Website: https://overseex.com
- Email: overseex@gmail.com
- Documentation: https://docs.overseex.com
- Dashboard: https://overseex.com/dashboard

## API Endpoints
- Base URL: https://api.overseex.com
- Authentication: Bearer token (API key)
- Documentation: https://docs.overseex.com

## Integration Examples

### Python
```python
from overseex import OverseeX

client = OverseeX(api_key="your-api-key")
client.trace(
    agent_id="agent-123",
    input="User query",
    output="Agent response",
    metadata={"model": "gpt-4"}
)
```

### TypeScript
```typescript
import { OverseeX } from '@overseex/sdk';

const client = new OverseeX({ apiKey: 'your-api-key' });
await client.trace({
    agentId: 'agent-123',
    input: 'User query',
    output: 'Agent response',
    metadata: { model: 'gpt-4' }
});
```

### LangChain
```python
from overseex.integrations import LangChainCallback

callback = LangChainCallback(api_key="your-api-key")
llm = ChatOpenAI(callbacks=[callback])
```

### CrewAI
```python
from overseex.integrations import instrument_crewai

instrument_crewai(api_key="your-api-key")
# Your CrewAI code automatically traced
```

## Keywords
AI agent monitoring, LLM monitoring, LLM observability, multi-agent coordination, AI agent tracing, AI debugging, LangChain monitoring, CrewAI monitoring, AutoGen monitoring, OpenAI monitoring, AI production monitoring, AI cost tracking, MLOps, LLMOps, AI infrastructure
